name: Beijing Tianyishangjia New Material Corp.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing Tianyishangjia New Material Corp., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and markets brake pads and brake block series products for high-speed trains, EMU, rolling stock, urban rail transit vehicles. Its products include sintered brake pads, sintered brake shoes, organic brake pads, organic brake shoes, brake blocks, and other products. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Beijing, China.
